text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, November 01. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning for future education costs. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Greg Holloway wants to drop secure messaging to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of secure messaging now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Ethan did great with his school homework. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
